---
source: NIST SP 800-53 r5 — Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations
license: Public domain (U.S. federal publication)
url_reference: https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-53/rev-5/final
summary: Paraphrased control summaries used as RFP evidence. Not a substitute for the canonical NIST text.
---

# AC-2 Account Management
Approved Wording: SentinelAI provisions, modifies, disables, and removes accounts through a documented account lifecycle. Privileged accounts are reviewed quarterly and disabled after 30 days of inactivity. Account changes are logged to the customer's audit feed.

# AC-2(1) Automated System Account Management
Approved Wording: Account lifecycle events are automated through the IDP integration. Manual overrides require a dual-approval workflow recorded in the audit trail.

# AC-3 Access Enforcement
Approved Wording: Access enforcement is RBAC + ABAC over tenant boundaries. Cross-tenant access is denied by default and policy-overridable only through a signed break-glass workflow.

# AC-6 Least Privilege
Approved Wording: Roles are scoped to the minimum permission set required for a job function. Privileged role assumption requires MFA and is time-boxed.

# AC-17 Remote Access
Approved Wording: Administrative remote access requires mTLS plus hardware-backed MFA and is brokered through the bastion. Customer-facing endpoints are TLS 1.2+ only.

# AU-2 Event Logging
Approved Wording: SentinelAI logs all auth, access, and configuration events with tenant tag, actor, action, timestamp, and outcome. Logs are immutable and retained 365 days by default, configurable up to 7 years.

# AU-4 Audit Storage Capacity
Approved Wording: Log storage is auto-scaled per tenant; capacity alerts trigger before retention guarantees are at risk.

# AU-6 Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
Approved Wording: Detection engineering reviews high-severity events within 15 minutes 24/7. Anomalies are escalated to the customer's named security contact.

# AU-12 Audit Record Generation
Approved Wording: Audit records are generated by every privileged module. They cannot be disabled at runtime.

# CM-3 Configuration Change Control
Approved Wording: Production changes follow a documented CAB process. Emergency changes require post-event review within 24 hours.

# CP-2 Contingency Planning
Approved Wording: Continuity plans are tested twice per year against the published RTO/RPO targets. Test reports are summarized in the customer trust center.

# IR-4 Incident Handling
Approved Wording: The Incident Response team owns triage, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-mortem. The IR runbook covers data, identity, and supply-chain incidents.

# IR-6 Incident Reporting
Approved Wording: Reportable incidents are communicated to affected customers within 72 hours of confirmation, with status updates every 24 hours until resolved.

# RA-5 Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
Approved Wording: Internal and external scans run weekly; authenticated scans run monthly. Critical findings are remediated within 7 days; high findings within 30 days.

# SC-7 Boundary Protection
Approved Wording: All public ingress is fronted by a managed WAF + DDoS protection. Internal traffic is segmented into tier-based VPCs with deny-by-default policies.

# SC-8 Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
Approved Wording: All data in transit between customer and SentinelAI is TLS 1.2+ with HSTS. Internal service-to-service traffic uses mTLS.

# SC-12 Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management
Approved Wording: KMS is hardware-backed (FIPS 140-2 Level 3). Customer-managed keys are supported under the BYOK addendum.

# SC-13 Cryptographic Protection
Approved Wording: At-rest data is AES-256-GCM. Backups are encrypted with separate keys. Approved algorithms align with NIST FIPS publications.

# SC-28 Protection of Information at Rest
Approved Wording: Tenant data is encrypted at rest with per-tenant data encryption keys wrapped by the tenant key. Customer-managed-key envelopes are sealed by an HSM.

# SI-4 System Monitoring
Approved Wording: A 24/7 SOC monitors security telemetry and customer-elected detection content. Detection coverage is mapped to MITRE ATT&CK and reviewed quarterly.

# SI-7 Software, Firmware, and Information Integrity
Approved Wording: Build artifacts are signed; deployment requires a valid signature and SBOM. Runtime integrity is monitored via attested control plane checks.

# PM-7 Mission/Business Process Definition
Approved Wording: Risk-tier definitions and security categorizations are reviewed annually with the Chief Risk Officer.
